blockingIssues.description: `tests/support/multipart.rs` parses multipart bodies through UTF-8 text, so binary upload fixtures can fail or lose byte fidelity in the shared harness.
`ClientConfig::resolve()` re-reads environment variables on every request, so an env-backed `OpenAI` client does not keep immutable deterministic config after construction.
The custom `http://` loopback transport rebuilds requests with `url.path()` only, dropping query strings for localhost/mock HTTP requests.
The custom `http://` loopback transport does not decode `Transfer-Encoding: chunked`, so valid chunked localhost/mock responses can fail as parse errors.
`tests/live_core_smoke.rs` does not clear or assert `OPENAI_BASE_URL`, so the live smoke can pass against an override host and does not prove required default-host behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/environment.md` guidance that default-host live proofs must unset `OPENAI_BASE_URL` in the same shell before execution.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit Exec Mode fallback for the required `brainstorming` step on shared-core changes so workers can satisfy the procedure without an approval loop when the mission is non-interactive.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All four core-foundation review reports recorded the same deviation: the worker invoked the required skill stack, but the `sdk-core-worker` procedure still assumes a brainstorming approval gate that cannot be completed in non-interactive mission exec mode.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated shared-state observation that `sdk-core-worker` lacks an Exec Mode fallback for the required brainstorming step.
Repeated shared-state observation that `sdk-core-worker` lacks an Exec Mode fallback for the required brainstorming step.
Repeated shared-state observation that `sdk-core-worker` lacks an Exec Mode fallback for the required brainstorming step.
Review claim that exposing `skills()` from the scaffold is necessarily out of contract because `architecture.md` does not name Skills.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: `.factory/library/api-surface.md` and the mission feature plan both include a future Skills surface, so this is not a clear contract violation for the scaffold.
